## Findings
- [ ] **[WARN][Docs] macOS client GUI not documented in README**
  - **Status quo:** A new native macOS Swift GUI and DMG packaging was implemented under `client/`, but it is not mentioned in `README.md`.
  - **Likely cause:** Documentation was not updated during client migration/implementation.
  - **Proposed solution:** Add a brief section in the README describing the macOS GUI client app and how to build/install it.
  - **Handoff:** `/02-gh-plan --from-review`
